description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a spacious open-plan interior, including multiple rooms and a large central living area. The exterior is finished in a muted gray tone, complemented by white-framed windows and doors. A wooden deck extends from the rear, leading to a fenced backyard with a swimming pool and a small shed. The front facade includes a curved driveway, landscaped garden beds, and a three-car garage. The roof is flat, and the property is surrounded by a low fence, providing a sense of privacy. The design is modern and functional, with ample outdoor living space and clear separation between public and private areas.
description: A modern, single-story gray bungalow with a flat roof, three-car garage, wooden deck, backyard pool, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wooden deck, swimming pool, fenced backyard, and small shed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, side garden, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the three-car garage, curved driveway, main entrance, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the rear deck with pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
